name: UpGuard CyberRisk
description: Third-party risk and attack surface management platform providing vendor security ratings, continuous monitoring, data breach detection, and security questionnaire automation

actions.name: List Risks
actions.description: Retrieve a list of risks detected for your organization's own domains and infrastructure

parameters.name: include_sources
parameters.description: Include hostname and port information for affected assets

actions.name: Get Vendor Risks
actions.description: Retrieve risks detected for a specific third-party vendor by hostname

parameters.name: primary_hostname
parameters.description: Primary hostname of the vendor (e.g., vendor.com)

parameters.name: include_sources
parameters.description: Include hostname and port information for affected assets

actions.name: List Domains
actions.description: Retrieve the list of domains being monitored for the organization

actions.name: Get Domain Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed security information for a specific monitored domain

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: Hostname of the domain to query

actions.name: List Vendors
actions.description: Retrieve all third-party vendors in the monitored portfolio with their security scores

parameters.name: labels
parameters.description: Comma-separated labels to filter vendors by

actions.name: Get Vendor Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed security assessment for a specific vendor including scores and risk breakdown

actions.name: List Data Breaches
actions.description: Retrieve identity breaches detected for the organization (requires feature enabled)

actions.name: Get Risk Changes
actions.description: Retrieve changes in risks between two points in time showing new and resolved risks
